title: 6 x Multi Use Bugs Sticky Boards Trap | Efficient Pack Of Invertebrates Glue Boards | 6 Traps Per Pack Effective Bugs Boards To Use Inside The Home, Garden & Office
features: 6 x Multi-Bugs Glue Boards traps are ideal for controlling Invertebrate pests like Spiders, Flies, Bugs, Ticks and Insects in the home, office and gardens. These glue traps are suitable for a quick non-toxic and non-poisonous solution to invertebrate pests in the home office and garden.

6 x Multi-Bugs Glue Boards Traps comes with extra strong adhesive and have a wide capture surface for effective and low cost controlling of pests like spiders, flies, moths, ticks, bugs and other insects.

6 x Multi-Bugs Extra Strong Glue Board Traps are also ideal for food premises like processing factories, bakeries, takeaways and other difficult commercial situations where insecticides or poisons are impractical.
These traps can be used in a box-like tent setup or multi-shapes as required.

Multi-use and Multi-purpose , these traps are usable as flat traps, boxed traps, re-shaping as required or cut and stuck on walls or other harder to reach surfaces in the home, office or garden for control of invertebrate pests. These traps are completely non- poisonous, Insecticide Free and non-toxic. Easily disposable, environmentally friendly and a chemical free option. PLEASE NOTE: Item Comes in either Green or Black as in images. (Colour does not affect usage).
